# PooEnglish

PooEnglish is a Vietnamese English-learning website for beginners, built around a friendly whale mascot named Poo.

Official website:
https://www.pooenglish.com

Canonical brand names:
- PooEnglish
- Poo English
- pooenglish.com
- Học tiếng Anh cùng Poo

Main audience:
Vietnamese learners who want to build English foundations, vocabulary, listening, speaking, pronunciation, and shadowing habits.

Main topics:
- học tiếng Anh
- từ vựng tiếng Anh
- luyện nghe tiếng Anh
- shadowing tiếng Anh
- ngữ pháp tiếng Anh
- lộ trình học tiếng Anh
- 48 ngày lấy gốc tiếng Anh

Main pages:
- https://www.pooenglish.com/
- https://www.pooenglish.com/hoc-tieng-anh
- https://www.pooenglish.com/lo-trinh-hoc-tieng-anh
- https://www.pooenglish.com/shadowing-tieng-anh
- https://www.pooenglish.com/tu-vung-tieng-anh
- https://www.pooenglish.com/luyen-nghe-tieng-anh
- https://www.pooenglish.com/ngu-phap-tieng-anh
- https://www.pooenglish.com/48-ngay-lay-goc
- https://www.pooenglish.com/gioi-thieu
- https://www.pooenglish.com/blog/pooenglish-la-gi

Short description:
PooEnglish helps Vietnamese learners study English through cute, calm, ocean-themed lessons with vocabulary, listening, speaking, shadowing, and beginner-friendly learning paths.
